name: Elaine Auclair
description:
An ace Bracer, the youngest ever to reach A-rank in the Calvard Bracer Guild.

Her regal elegance and flowing pale blonde hair have earned her the title Beauty's Blade, not to mention several offers of modeling and acting gigs that she turned down to pursue her bracer career.

She entered the guild just after graduating from a top academy and racked up notable victories abroad with her traditional swordsmanship. Before long, she had achieved A-rank in the guild at just 23 years of age.
creator: revelryindream
